profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Chitose Internasional Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells furniture products for hotels, restaurants, offices, schools, hospitals, and homes in Indonesia. The company provides chairs, desks, tables, cabinets, racks and storage products, lobby spaces, folding chairs, mattress, office equipment, and memo chairs, as well as accessories and hospital beds. It markets its products through a network of distributors and agents. The company also sells its products through stores and online. It exports its products. The company was formerly known as PT Chitose Indonesia Manufacturing Limited and changed its name to PT Chitose Internasional Tbk in 2013. PT Chitose Internasional Tbk was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Cimahi, Indonesia. PT Chitose Internasional Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Tritirta Inti Mandiri.
